rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF LEONISA A. TRIAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Elisor To Execute Documents On Behalf Of Prestina Trias Macias; Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Co-Conservators Lauro Trias and Ramona Figueira's Motion for Appointment of Elisor to Execute Documents. There is no Proof of Service of this motion on file. Co-Conservators Lauro Trias and Ramona Figueira's Motion for Appointment of Elisor to Execute Documents is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, pending filing of a valid Proof of Service. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF COLETTE FISHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/20/2024 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 12/29/2023), although the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 11/03/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received. 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the GC-020 form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) Allegations required by Probate Code section 1064(a)(1)-(5) must be provided. 4) Re summary of account: i) The ending date must be 06/30/2023. ii) The beginning balances of cash assets and non-cash assets must match the ending balances reported on the amended first account. 5) The first amended account reported receipts from the TIAA account, but no receipts were reported for this account period. 6) Interest, capital gain distributions, and dividends credited to the Stiffel account were not reported as receipts. 7) No schedule was attached to identify each purchase of additional shares of mutual funds held in the Stiffel account. 8) Re Schedule E: i) The ending date must be 06/30/2023. ii) The market value of the TIAA annuity does not match the vested balance listed on the account statement. iii) The market value of the mutual funds held in the Stiffel account does not match the value listed on the account statement. iv) A reconciliation statement must be provided to show how the adjusted carry value was calculated for each asset. 9) Re Exhibits A & B: An allegation must be made as to whether the ending statement of each account attached to the petition is original. If the guardians received the statements in electronic form, a verification required by section 2620(c)(1) must be provided. Note: An appearance may be required on 02/20/2024, if no satisfactory progress is shown by papers filed to address the issues.

rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY** IN THE MATTER OF THE PATRICK F. KELLY AND MARGARET KELLY REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Invalidate Trust Restatement And For Construction
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed: 1) Notice was timely but the notice of hearing was given on Form DE-115, the mandatory form for 850 petitions. Petitioners do not cite or reference Probate Code Section 850 anywhere in their petition. It appears that notice ought to have been given on Form DE-120. 2) Court to determine whether venue in San Francisco is proper. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
